subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of the hidden and the manifest. Praise be unto God that thou hast attained unto the pearls of might and bounty from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن علیک بهاء الله مولی السر و العلن لله الحمد فائز شدی بلئالی عزت و عطا از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
